title: Guns with infinite ammo
description: This adds relatively good guns, that have infinite ammo!!! What we all need
body: This mod adds 6 guns, the AK-47, the AR-15, the missile launcher, sniper rifle, deagle, golden deagle, and flamethrower. All of them have infinite ammo, and the bullet item is NOT AMMO, IT IS CRAFTING INGREDIENT. They do relatively high damage as well.
